([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Калінінський район) is an urban district of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), named after a Soviet political figure [Mikhail Kalinin](/wiki/Mikhail_Kalinin "Mikhail Kalinin").

This article is about a district in city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"). For an administrative division under similar name, see [Kalininsky District](/wiki/Kalininsky_District_(disambiguation) "Kalininsky District (disambiguation)").

Districts of Donetsk on the territory of the Donetsk City Municipality:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Budonivskyi District  Voroshylovskyi District  Kalininskyi District  Kyivskyi District  Kirovskyi District | Kuibyshevskyi District  Leninskyi District  Petrovskyi District  Proletarskyi District |

**Kalininskyi District** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Калінінський район) is an urban district of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), named after a Soviet political figure [Mikhail Kalinin](/wiki/Mikhail_Kalinin "Mikhail Kalinin").
